title: Arqone Frostline
description: Frostline is a survival-focused Minecraft modpack. Frostline Modpack is meant to be more than just a Modpack. It's a cozy winter experience, a space to connect, relax, and enjoy Minecraft during Christmas times.
body:
# Arqone Frostline ❄️  
[![Powered by NeoForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Powered%20by-NeoForge-blue?logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,)](https://neoforged.net)

### A frozen survival overhaul.

⚠️ Recommended RAM Allocation: 6–8 GB
Minimum: 4 GB (will cause slow worldgen or lag spikes)


**Arqone Frostline** is a survival-focused modpack designed around Christmas time, cold environments, exploration, and immersion.  
Every mod has been carefully picked to fit a cohesive *winter atmosphere*, with rebalanced survival mechanics, visuals, and ambient effects.  

❄️ *Part of the Arqone Project Network*  
🌨️ *Smooth gameplay, immersive visuals, and performance-friendly setup*  
🧊 *Compatible with NeoForge 1.21.1*

> This pack is developed as part of the **Arqone: Frostline** project - a unique survival experience connecting web, community, and gameplay. [www.arqone.eu/frostline](https://www.arqone.eu/frostline)

---

### 📦 Features
- Custom-balanced survival experience  
- Hand-picked winter & weather mods  
- Optimized visuals (Photon shaders & Distant Horizons ready)  

---

### 🧊 Slovenský popis
**Arqone Frostline** je survival modpack so zimnou a Vianočnou atmosférou a plynulým gameplayom.  
Každý mod bol vybraný tak, aby ladil s mrazivým prostredím.

❄️ *Súčasť Arqone Project Network*  
🌨️ *Plynulý beh, prepracovaná atmosféra a mnoho viac*  

---

### 📦 Funkcie
- Prepracovaný survival systém  
- Zimné a ambientné módy  
- Vylepšené efekty (Photon shaders & Distant Horizons ready)  

---

### Credits & Licenses:
This modpack utilizes a variety of incredible mods created by the Minecraft community. Full credit goes to the original authors for their amazing work. 

I have included some external mods and modified version of some mods. Below you can find information about the original mods.

- More Chest Variants by LieOnLion [Source - Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-chest-variants-lieonlion) - Edited
- ~~Iron Chests by ProgWML6 [Source - Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iron-chests)~~ USED IN OLDER VERSIONS
- AllTheLeaks (Memory Leak Fix) by Uncandango [Source - Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alltheleaks)


_Note: All included mods are used under their respective licenses (e.g., MIT, LGPL, MPL) and comply with author permissions. For specific license files, please check the individual mod pages._



*Created by Kexe as part of the Arqone universe.*
